evals.prompt: This is a PR. Please do a security review and give refactor advice.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Code Audit Council without incorrectly enabling Git workflow.

evals.prompt: Please review this Java GC issue and give recommendations.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Code Audit Council with Java Virtuoso as the language copilot.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Design a Go plus Gin high-concurrency API gateway.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Technical Trinity and detect Go context.

evals.prompt: Redo the admin page interaction and visual design, and improve the React component structure.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to World-Class Product Architect without backend or audit agents taking over.

evals.prompt: Help me commit this change set properly and push the branch.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Git Workflow Guardian and include a git-workflow plan.
expectations: process_plan first commands contain python scripts/git_workflow_guardrail.py --repo . --stage G3 --pretty
process_plan first commands contain git push -u origin feat/<ticket>-<summary>

evals.prompt: Core module refactor. Research first, then execute.
evals.expected_output: Research-first core refactor work should escalate to Sentinel Architect (NB) without forcing extra governance overlays unless stronger risk signals are present.

evals.prompt: Define the onboarding user flow, acceptance criteria, and backend contract for this signup revamp.
evals.expected_output: Product-definition requests should route to World-Class Product Architect, attach Technical Trinity, and use the product delivery bundle.

evals.prompt: Define the rollback plan and branch delivery flow for this core refactor.
evals.expected_output: Governance-heavy delivery requests should route to Git Workflow Guardian and use the governance bundle.

evals.prompt: This is a PR. Please do the audit, then after the fixes commit and push properly.
evals.expected_output: Mixed audit plus commit/push execution should route to Git Workflow Guardian as the delivery lead once explicit Git actions dominate the request.

evals.prompt: Help me figure out what to do with this requirement.
evals.expected_output: Low-information requests should fall back to clarification instead of forced routing.

evals.prompt: Run the formal release gate.
evals.expected_output: Process-only, low-confidence requests should stay single-lead instead of expanding to assistants.

evals.prompt: Use Python and FastAPI to build a backend service.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Technical Trinity and detect Python without enabling Git workflow.

evals.prompt: Review this Django API for security issues.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Code Audit Council and attach Technical Trinity as the Python implementation copilot.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Refactor this Flask service and then commit and push the branch.
evals.expected_output: Git execution should route to Git Workflow Guardian and enable git-workflow even when a Python service is mentioned.

evals.prompt: Design a Python service with Celery workers and reliability guardrails.
evals.expected_output: Python async service design should stay with Technical Trinity and not trigger Git workflow.

evals.prompt: This is a PR. Review this Django service for security issues before merge.
evals.expected_output: Mixed PR audit on a Python service should keep Code Audit Council as lead while attaching Git Workflow Guardian and Technical Trinity.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Use FastAPI for a backend service, then commit, push, and isolate the work in a worktree.
evals.expected_output: FastAPI plus Git execution plus isolation should route to Git Workflow Guardian, attach Technical Trinity, and enable both worktree and git-workflow process skills.

evals.prompt: Design a Go service with Gin and improve concurrency.
evals.expected_output: Go service design should route to Technical Trinity and detect Go without enabling Git workflow.

evals.prompt: Review this Go API for security issues before merge.
evals.expected_output: Go audit review should keep Code Audit Council as lead, attach Technical Trinity, and still enable Git workflow for merge-oriented context.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Use Go with Gin, then commit, push, and isolate the work in a worktree.
evals.expected_output: Go plus Git execution plus worktree isolation should route to Git Workflow Guardian, attach Technical Trinity, and enable both process skills.

evals.prompt: Design a Node.js service with NestJS.
evals.expected_output: Node.js service design should route to Technical Trinity and detect nodejs without enabling Git workflow.

evals.prompt: Review this NestJS API for security issues before merge.
evals.expected_output: Node.js audit review should keep Code Audit Council as lead and attach Technical Trinity while enabling Git workflow for merge context.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Use Node.js with NestJS, then commit, push, and isolate the work in a worktree.
evals.expected_output: Node.js plus Git execution plus worktree isolation should route to Git Workflow Guardian, attach Technical Trinity, and enable both process skills.

evals.prompt: Design a Java Spring Boot service for order processing.
evals.expected_output: Java service design should route to Java Virtuoso without enabling Git workflow.

evals.prompt: Review this Spring Boot API for security issues before merge.
evals.expected_output: Java audit review should keep Code Audit Council as lead, attach Java Virtuoso and Git Workflow Guardian, and enable Git workflow for merge context.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Use Java with Spring Boot, then commit, push, and isolate the work in a worktree.
evals.expected_output: Java plus Git execution plus worktree isolation should route to Git Workflow Guardian, attach Java Virtuoso, and enable both process skills.

evals.prompt: Redesign this React dashboard UI and improve the interaction flow.
evals.expected_output: Frontend redesign and interaction work should route to World-Class Product Architect without backend or Git agents taking over.

evals.prompt: Audit this checkout UX for accessibility and mobile responsiveness.
evals.expected_output: Checkout UX and accessibility review should stay with World-Class Product Architect and must not be misrouted to Git because of the word checkout.

evals.prompt: Improve the Tailwind admin UI, then commit, push, and isolate the work in a worktree.
evals.expected_output: Frontend UI work plus Git execution and worktree isolation should keep World-Class Product Architect as lead, attach Git Workflow Guardian, and enable both process skills.

evals.prompt: Design a React design system with Tailwind tokens and shared components.
evals.expected_output: Design-system work should route to World-Class Product Architect without backend or Git agents taking over.

evals.prompt: Improve the motion design for this React landing page with Framer Motion.
evals.expected_output: Motion and interaction design should route to World-Class Product Architect.

evals.prompt: Redesign this analytics dashboard for mobile responsiveness and better information hierarchy.
evals.expected_output: Responsive dashboard redesign should route to World-Class Product Architect instead of falling back to a generic technical lead.

evals.prompt: Audit this signup form UX for accessibility, validation, and conversion friction.
evals.expected_output: Form UX and accessibility review should route to World-Class Product Architect.

evals.prompt: Redesign this React admin page and align the frontend flow with the backend API contract.
evals.expected_output: Frontend redesign plus backend contract alignment should keep World-Class Product Architect as lead and attach Technical Trinity as the engineering copilot.

evals.prompt: Design a Next.js admin console with shadcn/ui and Tailwind.
evals.expected_output: Next.js plus shadcn/ui plus Tailwind design work should route to World-Class Product Architect.

evals.prompt: Improve the Framer Motion transitions and loading states in this React onboarding flow.
evals.expected_output: Framer Motion interaction work should route to World-Class Product Architect.

evals.prompt: Redesign the login flow, align auth UX with the backend API, and handle error states clearly.
evals.expected_output: Auth UX plus backend API alignment should keep World-Class Product Architect as lead and attach Technical Trinity.

evals.prompt: 用 Next.js 和 Tailwind 重做这个后台页面的交互和视觉层次。
evals.expected_output: Chinese frontend redesign requests for Next.js and Tailwind should route to World-Class Product Architect.

evals.prompt: 优化这个表单的错误提示、空状态和接口失败反馈，并和后端 API 契约对齐。
evals.expected_output: Chinese frontend error-state plus API-contract requests should keep World-Class Product Architect as lead and attach Technical Trinity.

evals.prompt: 帮我提个 commit 然后 push，那个 dashboard 也顺手改下。
evals.expected_output: Colloquial Git plus dashboard requests should keep World-Class Product Architect as lead and attach Git Workflow Guardian as the delivery copilot.

evals.prompt: 把这个注册流程需求拆一下，验收标准和接口契约也一起落一下。
evals.expected_output: Colloquial product-scope requests should route to World-Class Product Architect and attach Technical Trinity.

evals.prompt: review 下这个 nest 接口，顺便看下 auth flow。
evals.expected_output: Mixed Chinese-English audit requests over Nest auth flows should keep Code Audit Council as lead and attach Technical Trinity.

evals.prompt: 给这个 djagno 登录表单做个 ux review，并和后端 api 对齐。
evals.expected_output: Misspelled framework plus frontend/backend mixed review should keep World-Class Product Architect as lead and attach Technical Trinity.

evals.prompt: We need an onboarding MVP with product scope, acceptance criteria, and backend delivery.
evals.expected_output: MVP product-delivery requests should route to World-Class Product Architect, attach Technical Trinity, and keep governance in the regular track.

evals.prompt: This is a PR. Review this Django service for security issues, then tell me the exact fixes and the safest next delivery step.
evals.expected_output: Audit-and-fix handoff scenarios should keep Code Audit Council as lead, attach Technical Trinity, and preserve review priority routing.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Set the pricing strategy and growth plan for this SaaS.
evals.expected_output: Pure business-strategy requests should stay low-confidence and ask for clarification instead of pretending the skill owns company strategy.

evals.prompt: Redesign the billing settings UX, align it with the backend API contract, and make the states responsive.
evals.expected_output: Frontend and backend coupling runbook scenarios should keep World-Class Product Architect as lead and attach Technical Trinity.

evals.prompt: This is a production-critical payment migration. Research first, stage it, define rollback, and handle the PR safely.
evals.expected_output: High-risk production change scenarios should attach Sentinel Architect (NB) and Git Workflow Guardian while keeping the owning specialist in charge.

evals.prompt: Review this Spring Boot PR, then commit and push the fixes.
evals.expected_output: When review, git delivery, and Java stack signals conflict, review should remain lead while Git and implementation specialists attach as assistants.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Redesign the dashboard UX, align it with the backend API, then commit and push.
evals.expected_output: When frontend/backend coupling and explicit git delivery conflict, World-Class Product Architect should remain lead while Technical Trinity and Git Workflow Guardian attach as assistants.

evals.prompt: Define the onboarding flow, then define the implementation plan and rollout PR flow.
evals.expected_output: When product scope, implementation, and rollout PR flow conflict, World-Class Product Architect should remain lead while Git Workflow Guardian and Technical Trinity attach.

evals.prompt: Define the rollback plan, then open the PR and define rollback for this refactor.
evals.expected_output: When governance and explicit PR or rollback flow conflict, Git Workflow Guardian should remain lead and keep the governance bundle active.

evals.prompt: We already tried two fixes. It still fails in production. Stop guessing, inspect the logs, find the root cause, and only then propose the next step.
evals.expected_output: Repeated failed attempts plus explicit root-cause language should escalate to Sentinel Architect (NB), with Technical Trinity attached for runtime or implementation analysis.

evals.prompt: This MCP server registration still fails after multiple attempts. Read the logs, inspect the config, identify the root cause, and stage the safest fix.
evals.expected_output: MCP or config-runtime root-cause requests should escalate to Sentinel Architect (NB) and attach Technical Trinity for system-level diagnosis.

evals.prompt: Run another iteration, benchmark it against the baseline, and stop if the result regresses.
evals.expected_output: Explicit optimization-loop prompts should enable bounded iteration, keep the lead lightweight, and expose the iteration plan.
expectations: process_plan first commands contain cp assets/iteration-plan-template.json .skill-iterations/iteration-plan.json
process_plan first commands contain python scripts/register_benchmark_baseline.py --workspace .skill-iterations --label stable --report <baseline-report> --pretty

process_plan first commands contain python scripts/run_iteration_cycle.py --workspace .skill-iterations --round-id round-01 --objective "<goal>" --baseline-label stable --owner "Technical Trinity" --candidate "<candidate-change>" --candidate-worktree ../wt-round-01 --candidate-output-dir .tmp-iteration-round-01 --pretty

process_plan first commands contain python scripts/compare_benchmark_results.py --baseline .skill-iterations/baselines/stable/benchmark-results.json --candidate .tmp-iteration-round-01/benchmark-results.json --pretty
process_plan first commands contain python scripts/promote_iteration_baseline.py --workspace .skill-iterations --round-id round-01 --label accepted-round-01 --pretty
process_plan first commands contain python scripts/sync_distilled_patterns.py --workspace .skill-iterations --pretty
process_plan first commands contain python scripts/run_iteration_loop.py --workspace .skill-iterations --plan .skill-iterations/iteration-plan.json --pretty

evals.prompt: Is this version ready to ship? Do not answer from benchmark alone. Run the formal release gate.
evals.expected_output: Release-readiness prompts should enable the formal ship-or-hold gate instead of routing to generic git workflow.
expectations: process_plan first commands contain python scripts/run_release_gate.py --output-dir evals/release-gate --pretty

evals.prompt: 这版现在能不能提交/发版？不要只看 benchmark，通过正式 release gate 做提交前验收。
evals.expected_output: Chinese release-readiness prompts with ambiguous 提交/发版 wording should still prefer the formal release gate and suppress generic git workflow routing.
expectations: process_plan first commands contain python scripts/run_release_gate.py --output-dir evals/release-gate --pretty

evals.prompt: Rewrite this project in Rust, plan before coding, and keep a progress tracker we can resume later.
evals.expected_output: Large rewrite planning should enable the pre-development planning branch, keep Technical Trinity as the default lead, and emit planning artifacts instead of jumping straight to iteration or Git workflow.
expectations: process_plan first commands contain python scripts/init_pre_development_plan.py --root . --task-name "<task-name>" --task-description "<task-description>" --phase-name foundation --pretty
process_plan first commands contain python scripts/init_project_memory.py --root . --mode planning --pretty

evals.prompt: 这个核心模块要大规模迁移，先调研再执行，先规划再开发。
evals.expected_output: Chinese research-first migration should keep the pre-development planning branch active while Sentinel Architect (NB) owns the high-risk planning flow.

evals.prompt: Run another iteration, benchmark it against the baseline, and stop if the result regresses.
evals.expected_output: Evidence-driven optimization should return the remediation loop bundle with a resume-ready round-memory anchor.
expectations: process_plan first commands contain python scripts/init_project_memory.py --root . --mode iteration --pretty

evals.prompt: Is this version ready to ship? Do not answer from benchmark alone. Run the formal release gate.
evals.expected_output: Formal ship readiness should return the ship-hold-remediate bundle and point the next session at release-gate artifacts.
expectations: response_pack_json evidence.workflow_source_explanation contains primary execution journey
response_pack_json next_action.smallest_executable_action contains run the release gate first

evals.prompt: This is a PR. Please do a security review and give refactor advice.
evals.expected_output: Audit-first requests should expose the audit-fix-deliver workflow bundle even when Git workflow is not required.
expectations: response_pack_json evidence.workflow_source_explanation contains strongly anchored in task semantics

evals.prompt: Define the onboarding user flow, acceptance criteria, and backend contract for this signup revamp.
evals.expected_output: Cross-domain product routing should keep a structured assistant delta contract so the lead can merge evidence instead of loose role fragments.

evals.prompt: 这个核心模块要大规模迁移，先调研再执行，先规划再开发。
evals.expected_output: Chinese planning response packs should expose structured evidence and resume blocks alongside the workflow source explanation.
expectations: response_pack_json evidence.workflow_source_explanation contains 主执行旅程

evals.prompt: Refactor this Flask service and then commit and push the branch.
evals.expected_output: verify_action should expose a schema-valid git-workflow decision with stable router snapshot fields.

evals.prompt: Define the onboarding user flow, acceptance criteria, and backend contract for this signup revamp.
evals.expected_output: verify_action should expose a schema-valid bundle-bootstrap decision when product delivery must initialize its workspace anchors first.

evals.prompt: 这个产品开发前后都要做内测，分三轮递增用户，并模拟不同类型的内测用户来收集反馈。
evals.expected_output: Beta-validation requests should route to the product lead, activate the beta bundle, and expose a staged cohort plan with simulated users.

evals.prompt: Release gate fixture: offline drill failure should hold and reopen the loop.
evals.expected_output: release_gate should expose a schema-valid hold result with reopened follow-up artifacts when offline drill fails.
